footer.tagline: Bangladesh's all-in-one service platform. Verified professionals across Dhaka for home, personal, business and technical services.
footer.rights: All rights reserved. Made in Dhaka 🇧🇩
footer.expansion: Launching first in Dhaka. Coming soon: Chattogram, Sylhet, Rajshahi, Khulna.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

aboutPage.description: We're building the country's most trusted service platform — starting in Dhaka, scaling to every district. Our model is simple: Provider → We → Consumer.
aboutPage.missionDesc: Make every kind of service in Bangladesh easy to find, trust, and book — in minutes, not days.
aboutPage.valuesDesc: Honesty in pricing. Quality in every booking. Respect for both customers and providers.
aboutPage.roadmapDesc: Dhaka first. Then Chattogram, Sylhet, Rajshahi, Khulna — and finally all 64 districts.
aboutPage.whyP1: Finding a reliable plumber, AC technician, or cleaner in Dhaka usually means asking neighbors, scrolling Facebook groups, and crossing your fingers. Skilled providers, on the other hand, struggle to find consistent work and customers who pay fairly. We're fixing both sides at once.
aboutPage.whyP2: Shebabd is the trusted middle layer. We verify every provider, train them on quality, market their services, handle bookings and payments, and back every job with our service guarantee. The result: confidence for customers, and steady livelihoods for providers.

howItWorksPage.description: Skilled providers join our platform. We verify, organize and support. You book trusted services in minutes, with a guarantee.
howItWorksPage.p1Desc: We onboard skilled professionals — they submit ID, trade docs, and pass our quality checks.
howItWorksPage.p2Desc: We organize, train, market, and handle support. We are your trusted middle layer.
howItWorksPage.p3Desc: Customers discover, compare, book, and pay through us — backed by our service guarantee.
howItWorksPage.c1Desc: Search 200+ services or browse by category.
howItWorksPage.c2Desc: Pick a slot, give your area, add notes.
howItWorksPage.c3Desc: We assign the best verified pro.
howItWorksPage.c4Desc: Pay after work is done. Re-do if needed.
howItWorksPage.p2pDesc: We review and approve in 2–5 days.
howItWorksPage.p3pDesc: We send qualified leads in your area.

pricingPage.description: Every category has a starting price. Final pricing is confirmed after inspection — no hidden charges, no payment until the work is done.

faqPage.q1: How do I book a service?
faqPage.a1: Search or browse a category, click 'Book a Service', fill in your details and preferred time. We confirm by phone within an hour.
faqPage.a2: You only pay after the work is done and you're satisfied. Cash, mobile wallet (bKash/Nagad), and card are all supported.
faqPage.a3: Yes. Every provider passes ID + background checks before joining. Their ratings come only from real, completed bookings.
faqPage.q4: What if I'm not happy with the work?
faqPage.a4: Our service guarantee covers re-do or refund. Contact our support team within 48 hours of the job and we'll make it right.
faqPage.a5: We currently serve 11 major areas across Dhaka — Dhanmondi, Gulshan, Banani, Uttara, Mirpur, Mohammadpur, Bashundhara, Badda, Farmgate, Motijheel and Old Dhaka. Expanding nationwide soon.
faqPage.q6: Can I book for someone else (parent, friend)?
faqPage.a6: Absolutely. Just provide their address and contact number in the booking notes — we'll coordinate with them directly.
faqPage.a7: Each service has a transparent starting price shown on the service page. Final pricing is confirmed after on-site inspection. No hidden charges.
faqPage.a8: Most categories have same-day availability. Call us directly for urgent bookings.

becomeProviderPage.title: Earn more, on your schedule.
becomeProviderPage.description: Join Bangladesh's fastest-growing service marketplace. Apply in 2 minutes — we'll review and onboard you in days.
becomeProviderPage.perk1Body: Match with customers in your area for the services you offer.
becomeProviderPage.perk2Body: Verified profiles and clear ratings build long-term reputation.
becomeProviderPage.perk3Body: Manage availability, jobs, and earnings from one dashboard.
becomeProviderPage.aboutPh: Briefly describe your services, specialties, and what makes you stand out.
becomeProviderPage.missing: Please fill in all required fields.
becomeProviderPage.success: Application received! We'll review and email you soon.
becomeProviderPage.doneDesc: Thanks for applying to join Shebabd. Our team will review your application and reach out within 2–3 business days.
